body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now features rough, cracked obsidian-like skin with molten gold fissures glowing along the seams. Pointed ears maintain their placement but are now edged with charcoal black and streaked with ember-scaled patterns. The compact body silhouette stays intact, covered in cracked magma-textured hide that pulses with amber light. Short stubby legs are encased in heat-resistant armor plating with glowing crimson accents at the joints.
signature_feature: Tail tip: cracked obsidian with molten gold fissures and ember sparks.
